dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires SMA(42) and SMA(252). Mapped to closest available indicators: sma_40 (short period) and sma_200 (long period). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the strategy trades both long and short depending on SMA relationship. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP and TRENDING_DOWN as specified in the original signal's TRENDING regime.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires SMA(42) and SMA(252). Mapped to closest available indicators: sma_40 (short period) and sma_200 (long period). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the strategy trades both long and short depending on SMA relationship. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP and TRENDING_DOWN as specified in the original signal's TRENDING regime.

source_rule_text: Generate trading signals by comparing the relationship between a shorter-period and longer-period Simple Moving Average; go long when the shorter SMA is above the longer SMA, and go short when it is below.
